name: splunk-viz-packs
description: Build fully themed Splunk custom visualization apps — branded viz suites with shared design tokens, Canvas 2D rendering, webpack/flat-AMD bundling, and AppInspect-ready packaging. Takes brand context (palette, fonts, tone) and produces installable Splunk apps with multiple custom vizs sharing one design system. Output: tarball ready for Splunk Cloud or Enterprise. Includes error diagnosis flowchart, subagent dispatch rules, and 50+ gotchas (F1-F12, B1-B23, R1-R8, I1-I2, C1-C9). Pairs with splunk-dashboard-studio plugin for dashboard JSON that uses the custom vizs.
